eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Illinois; at 11:15 PM ON FEB 2, 2026 Effective until 12:15 AM FEB 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the required Monthly Test of the Emergency Alert System originated by the Illinois Emergency Management Agency IEMA. Rebroadcast within 1 hour.
